comment.body:
Everybody including me listened to your critics and complaints in the past weeks carefully and patiently. I admitted what I had to admit, but now stop it. 
Especially stop talking like if you were my boss! You're not.
If you respect me, you let me do market analysis the way I think it should be done. I can predict moves, pivots, events quite accurately. 
You are not the only ppl here, reading my analyses. There are hundreds of ppl liestening to my analyses. One substack post of mine reaches more than 2k reads in two hours.
If you don't like, if you can't use it, admit it and leave. But stop destroying the atmosphere of the chat. Be mature. 
You got a lot of great answers and advices. You're not forced to be here.
  
Thank you.
